EU/Nordic Morning — 2026-02-24

  • Regime: Risk-off
  • Main driver: Breadth remains weak with larger downside in high-beta names and payment rails.
  • Posture: Defensive / selective adds only on confirmation

2\) ALPHA — Strategic View

  • Broad weakness in growth cluster suggests near-term caution; avoid concentration drift.
  • Cross-asset read: Gold down (-1.06%), BTC down (-2.22%) signals mixed risk appetite.
  • Keep core quality names, stage entries rather than chasing intraday moves.

3\) BETA — Tactical View

4\) Agent Discussion

  • Agreement: Preserve flexibility while breadth is weak (S&P -0.92%, NDQ -0.94%).
  • Disagreement: Buy first bounce now vs wait for opening confirmation.
  • Resolution: Re-risk only if price + breadth improve together.

5\) Unified Action Checklist
